title: Create a SUM line for only 2 of 3 groups on a board
excerpt: I have created a 2-year forecast to plan project budgets.  Each project or piece of equipment is represented as a row within a group.  Each month is represented as a Number Column ($) along with a formula column to SUM t…

posts.author: mhelwer (Morgan Helwer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a 2-year forecast to plan project budgets. Each project or piece of equipment is represented as a row within a group. Each month is represented as a Number Column ($) along with a formula column to SUM the TOTAL cost for the FY.

I’d need to create two rows at the end of the board reflecting the SUM for specified groups.

Example:
Row #1 - SUM of Groups 1, 3, 5
Row #2 - SUM of Groups 2, 4

This would allow me to see how much I have in budget for a specific project vs. Total Budget.

Is there any work around that can help me achieve this?

image1445×731 178 KB

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml: @MayBitman thank you. Which recipe would I use? I downloaded the Smart Columns app, but do not see any recipes for adding sum of specified groups.
